meta.prompt: 显示设备运行状态列表
evalHints: adminStatus is an integer enum: 1=active, 2=inactive, 3=maintenance — must NOT display as raw numbers
operStatus is an integer enum: 1=up, 2=down, 3=testing — must NOT display as raw numbers
lastSeen is epoch milliseconds — must be formatted as human-readable datetime
enum values should be rendered as human-readable labels with visual distinction
